ItemFilter.name: Raxx's S4 Universal Filter Rogue Mage

Rule.nameOverride: Early Caster Wpns - Turns off at 30
Early Melee Wpns - Turns off at 30
T2+ Movespeed & CDR - Turns off at 30
T2+ Phys Res / All Health - Turns off at 30
All Exalts or Better - Turns off at 60
Shatter T3+ Resistances - Turns off at 50
Shatter T3+ Movespeed & CDR - Turns off at 50
Shatter T3+ Phys Res / All Health - Turns off at 50
Campaign Idols (DESELECT CLASSES) - Turns off at 60
BIS Campaign Sentinel Armor & Relics - Turns off at 60
BIS Campaign Rogue Armor & Relics - Turns off at 60
BIS Campaign Primalist Armor & Relics - Turns off at 60
BIS Campaign Mage Armor & Relics - Turns off at 60
BIS Campaign Acolyte Armor & Relics - Turns off at 60
All Campaign Rules Turn Off At Level 60.
Deselect Classes You Won't Play In Idols.
Add Your BIS Weapons and Offhands.
Uncheck Early Game Weapons You Won't Use.
Campaign Rules Below. Uncheck classes you're not playing.
The Idol Altar Rule May Need Tweaking / Affix Tiers Added.
Change This To 1 Affix Present To Make It Less Strict.
For BIS Idols The Rules Require Both Affixes To Be Present.
Use Your Guide To Pick BIS Affixes.
Idol Rules Below. Turn On The BIS Idols For Your Classes.
Shatter Defensive Affixes (SELECT WHAT YOU NEED)
Shatter Offensive Affixes (SELECT WHAT YOU NEED)
Highly Needed Affixes (ADD AFFIXES YOU'RE LOW ON)
Item Bases (ADD TYPE TO TARGET SOMETHING SPECIFIC)
Items to Ascend (CHOOSE THE ITEM TYPE)
If You're MG, Turn Off the COF Requirement on Green.
You Only Need The Item Type, NOT The SubType To Ascend.
The Light Green Rule Is Used For Ascending Items.
The Pink Rules Allow You To Target Farm Specific Bases / Affixes.
Once You Have A Ton, Make The Rules More Strict / Turn Them Off.
Uncheck The Classes You Won't Play This Season.
Orange Shatter Rules Allow You To Build Shards For Crafting.
All Corrupts (SELECT AFFIXES) - Turns Off At 60
Turn These Rules Off Or Their Level Down If You Want.
These Rules Guarantee You Don't Miss Exalts / Unqiues.
Champion Affixes (TURN ON RULE & SELECT AFFIXES)
Exalted Experimentals (TURN OFF IF YOU DON'T USE)
Exalted Experimentals Are On B/C They're Rare.
They're Turned Off By Default B/C Not Many Builds Use Them.
These Rules Let You Farm Experimental / Champion Affixes.
Tier 6 Wpns/OHs (CHECK WPN/OH TYPES & DMGS & CLASSES)
Tier 6 Wpns/OHs (CHECK WPN/OH TYPES & DMGS & CLASSES)
Tier 6 Wpns/OHs (CHECK WPN/OH TYPES & DMGS & CLASSES)
Tier 7 Havoc (CHECK WPN/OH TYPES & DMGS & CLASSES)
Tier 7 Wpns/OHs (CHECK WPN/OH TYPES & DMGS & CLASSES)
To A BIS Affix. Very Powerful, Make Sure You Use This.
The Green Rule Allows You to Rune of Havoc A T7
The Gold Rules Above Will Show BIS Items For Ultimate Crafts.
Uncheck The Classes You Won't Play.
Because We Want To Bank Up T7s to Craft.
For The T7 Rule Pick Bases, But Select Nearly Every Affix
The T6s Turn Off At Level 90 B/C We Only Want T7s.
Warning: DO NOT PICK SUBTYPES. We're Slamming These.
For The T6 Rule Pick The Best Affixes & Weapon / OH Types.
Pay Very Close Attention To These Rules - They're Important.
Best Relics (ADD BEST T7 AFFIXES & SELECT CLASS)
Best Relics (ADD BEST T7 AFFIXES & SELECT CLASS)
Best Body Armour (ADD BEST T7 AFFIXES)
Best Offhand (ADD BEST OFFHAND BASE & T7 AFFIXES)
Best Weapon (ADD BEST WEAPON BASE & T7 AFFIXES)
Best Weapon (ADD BEST WEAPON BASE & T7 AFFIXES)
Best Weapon (ADD BEST WEAPON BASE & T7 AFFIXES)
Uncheck Classes You're Not Playing For The Double Exalts.
Don't Add SubTypes Unless You're Going To Wear The Item.
Add In All The Best Affixes For Each Slot.
These Are The Golden Rules For The BIS Items In LE.
Classes You Won't Play This Season (SELECT CLASSES)
In Case You Change Your Mind Later On.
It Will Still Keep Godly Uniques (Above) From Those Classes.
Hides Class Items You Won't Play This Season.
Only Turn Them Off If You Know What You're Doing.
I Would Strongly Advise To Always Leave Them All On.
These Rules Show Every "Resource" in LE.
Rarest Set Items (ADD ONES YOU WANT)
Rarest Uniques at LP0 (ADD BUILD SPECIFIC RARE UNIQUES)
As You Get Better Gear, You Can Make These More Strict.
Make Sure Your BIS Uniques Are Being Shown.
These Rules Show Unique & Set Items.
